nasb.text: Therefore I encourage you to take some food, for this is for your preservation, for not a hair from the head of any of you will perish.”

esv.text: Therefore I urge you to take some food. For it will give you strength, for not a hair is to perish from the head of any of you.”

cnv.text: 所以，我勸你們吃點飯，這可以維持你們的性命！因為你們沒有人會失掉一根頭髮。”

ccb.text: 我劝你们吃点东西，好活下去，你们必定毫发无损。”

csbs.text: 所以我劝你们用饭，因为这是关于你们得救的事。要知道，你们中间，没有一个人会失去一根头发。”
